strengths: ~15 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration systems
Founder of an open-source GIS platform showing initiative and long-term ownership
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Title and seniority history is Senior/Staff Developer level, not Principal/Director-level IC with strategic scope
No advanced degree in AI and no recognized AI products, platforms, or publications demonstrating cutting-edge AI expertise
Minimal demonstrated cloud-platform strategy work, no evidence of advising strategic customers or large-scale technical innovation leadership

key_factors.factor: Lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope and influence
No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms
Limited cloud strategy and external advisory experience

response.justification: The candidate's trajectory is that of a hands-on senior/staff full-stack developer rather than a Principal Engineer shaping AI strategy at director level. There is no advanced AI degree, no recognized AI products or platforms, and only a few months of recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling at re:cinq, followed by a current career gap. The resume shows no evidence of advising strategic customers, leading cloud-platform direction, or driving company-wide technical innovation at the scale this role requires, making them a weak fit for a 15-year, AI-focused Principal IC position.
